title: Frozen Egg
description: Whenever you add a Power into your [gold]Deck[/gold], [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it.
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: This relic upgrades all Power cards when they are added to your deck, including those found in card rewards and sold by the Merchant. It cannot be found in treasure chest rewards from Act 3 onwards.
